title: artemisia japonica var. manshurica
intro: Artemisia japonica var. manshurica, also known as Korean wormwood, is a plant species of the Artemisia genus, native to East Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Korean wormwood include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. In herbal preparations, Korean wormwood is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
